description: Environment prerequisites for `pnpm meeting:participate`: browser automation, audio I/O bus, streaming STT/TTS, and the per-mission voice-consent receipt.

capabilities.description: Playwright + a Chromium binary so the browser-driver can drive Meet/Zoom/Teams pre-join UIs.

install.instruction: After install, run `pnpm exec playwright install chromium` to download the browser binary. Operator confirmation required because this writes to the workspace package manifest.

capabilities.description: BlackHole 2ch virtual audio device (macOS). Required for the AI to read meeting audio and inject TTS as the bot's mic.

install.instruction: After install, open System Settings → Sound and create a Multi-Output Device that mirrors BlackHole 2ch + your default speaker so you can still hear the meeting locally. The bot uses the BlackHole half.

capabilities.description: PulseAudio (or pipewire-pulse) running on the host. Required for the AI's audio bus when running in a Linux container.

install.instruction: Install pulseaudio (or pipewire + pipewire-pulse) via your distro's package manager and start it. In a container image, run `pulseaudio -D --exit-idle-time=-1` before launching the participation runtime.

capabilities.description: ffmpeg binary on PATH; both audio buses use it to negotiate AVFoundation/Pulse devices.

install.instruction: macOS: `brew install ffmpeg`. Debian/Ubuntu: `apt-get install -y ffmpeg`. Other platforms: see the docs link.

capabilities.description: Streaming STT command, e.g. `whisper-stream --model … --json`. Without it, the participation runtime falls back to the stub (transcripts are placeholder text).

install.instruction: Set `KYBERION_STT_COMMAND` (and optional `KYBERION_STT_ARGS`) to a binary that reads PCM_S16LE on stdin and emits NDJSON transcript chunks on stdout. Examples: `whisper.cpp` stream, `faster-whisper`, Deepgram CLI. Stub backend is used when unset.

capabilities.description: Streaming TTS command, e.g. `piper --model … --output-raw`. Falls back to stub when unset.

install.instruction: Set `KYBERION_TTS_COMMAND` to a binary that reads newline-delimited UTF-8 text on stdin and emits PCM_S16LE audio on stdout. Examples: `piper`, `coqui XTTS`, Azure Neural TTS via REST.

capabilities.description: Per-mission voice-consent.json with `consent: granted`. Speaking into a meeting is refused without it.

install.instruction: Run `pnpm meeting:consent grant --mission MSN-… --operator <handle> --scope "…"` for the active mission. The CLI lands a `voice_consent.grant` audit entry. Bootstrap will substitute MISSION_ID and KYBERION_OPERATOR_HANDLE before invoking.
